title: Granny,s minions
description: the modpack used for the Granny's minions smp server
body:
This pack offers a medieval experience tailored around exploring fighting mythical beasts finding or making powerfull gear searching for new ways to expand your magic and of course making amazing foods while decorating beautifull houses!!!

There is no quest system to follow this is more made to just descover new things alone or with your firends

there is alot of new structures to explore and a carefully constructed end experince for you to enjoy!!!

this is the modpack used in the Granny,s minions smp
You cant join but if you want the same taylored experince you see your favorite streamers have please concider downloading
In season 2 we create a medieval experience 
If you would like to play in the same world as the Streamers on the smp for this season the seed is
2521943910546655827
the pack is being made so it is easier for us to let you experince how we play and enjoy the creation

Please consider following all the amazing streamers involved in this!
[Forgetfulgranny](https://www.twitch.tv/forgetfulgranny)
[Darkid4rk](https://www.twitch.tv/darkid4rk)
[Random_patches](https://www.twitch.tv/random_patches)

If you would prefer it as videos patches tries to make videos out of his adventures!
[Random_Patches](https://www.youtube.com/@Random_Patches)

Mod links:

[Cosmetic Armor Rework](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked)

[aquaculture](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture)

[mrcrayfish's furniture mod: Refurbished](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/refurbished-furniture)

[Shatterd world limits](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/new-world-height-and-depth)

(small disclamer: increes the ram that the pack can use :) )
